---
title: "Alice Fielden Walker"
---

## Alice Fielden Walker

**Dates:** (1850/1-1939)

**Maiden name:** (Ramsbotham)

### Description

wife of Colonel John Bridges Walker, colonel commandant of the Gordon Boys\' Home, Woking

### Biography

She married John Walker in 1874.  His obituary is in <i>The Times</i> (22 October 1925).

### Letters

- Letter from March 30 [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
